title: important news for all my evamonkey buddies
display_title: important news for all my evamonkey buddies
wikitext:
[]: important news for all my evamonkey buddies             Quote Post by defiate » Sat Nov 26, 2005 4:13 pm alrite so u know the eva platinum collection pack selling for $62 on amazon.com? well the price just dropped to $46 for the WHOLE PACK let me repeat: FORTY SIX UNITED STATES DOLLARS for the WHOLE NEON GENESIS EVANGELION SERIES PLATINUM (call me obnoxious but i think its a damn good deal, and no... i dont work for amazon.com) happy holidays, bla bla bla, go grab one now and u will never regret it.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Nov 26, 2005 4:15 pm Damn my unemployment

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Sat Nov 26, 2005 4:41 pm hahah datdude without employment i think u cud still afford that.. just ask your mom for THAT as an xmas present (she wudnt say no!)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Nov 26, 2005 4:47 pm I've got most of plat edition alread. Also I tend to keep my anime hobbie away from my parrents. Its probly best for their protection :)

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Nov 27, 2005 1:30 am DatDude wrote: Also I tend to keep my anime hobbie away from my parrents. Its probly best for their protection :)

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Sun Nov 27, 2005 12:48 pm yeah i shud have factored in the fact that most people here have the platinum pack already -___-

[]:             Quote Post by akda1ndaonly1 » Sun Nov 27, 2005 4:51 pm Damnit. I'd get it if I had the money. Maybe I'll ask my mom to lend me some money. But I doubt it.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Mon Nov 28, 2005 6:13 am OK, so what's so good about platinum edition? New scenes or something? Is it 'Renewal Of Evangelion'? How come everybody is sooo onto it?

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Mon Nov 28, 2005 8:44 am Reasons why Platinum rules.. 1)the picture looks brand new, not old like the original DVDs 2)There is now 5.0 surround sound 3) Director's cut episodes are included 4) the most important part.. the screen doesn't jump around everytime the scene changes like the old DVDs (I hated that)

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Nov 28, 2005 12:20 pm rb_182_ wrote: 2)There is now 5.0 surround sound

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Nov 28, 2005 12:37 pm On the downside we got AWL and her crownies telling us all these things that arn't true in the bonus comentaries Spike spencer, im sure your a cool guy in all but damn is he stupid, he thought that when Shinji and Misato were playing paper, sissors, rock that Shinji won. not only that but ... oh theres just to many.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Wed Nov 30, 2005 2:26 pm Yes the commentaries are evil :evil: but they are funny to listen to..

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Wed Nov 30, 2005 3:13 pm Space Penis wrote: rb_182_ wrote: 2)There is now 5.0 surround sound

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Thu Dec 01, 2005 3:08 am d'oh!! I meant 5.1.. :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Thu Dec 01, 2005 12:32 pm Also worthy of mention is that Wal-Mart is carrying the Platinum Thinpack for $47. Quite a steal. Especially if you do not want to pay the $90 that Suncoast is charging.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Dec 01, 2005 1:30 pm Someday I'll dance upon the ruins of the last demolished Wal-Mart, and smile a little smile. $47 for eternal happiness... I think I'd be happier with the dollars.

[]:             Quote Post by xiuxiu » Fri Dec 02, 2005 6:36 am right on. fuck wal mart.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Sat Dec 03, 2005 1:56 pm This is good. I'm planning on telling my mom. Heh.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sat Dec 03, 2005 7:05 pm Poor me... I already have half the normal plat dvds + box (a very ncie box I might add) theres no way im gana get the thin pack.

[]:             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Sat Dec 03, 2005 8:50 pm Woah, as Neo might say. This should rank up there with Amazon cutting $50 off the price of The Complete Calvin And Hobbes. I should get it soon, then... 8)
summary: []: important news for all my evamonkey buddies             Quote Post by defiate » Sat Nov 26, 2005 4:13 pm alrite so u know the eva platinum collection pack selling for $62 on amazon.com? well the price just dropped to $46 for the WHOLE PACK let me repeat: FORTY SIX UNITED STATES DOLLARS for the WHOLE NEON GENESIS EVANGELION SERIES PLATINUM (call me obnoxious but i think its a damn good deal, and no... i dont work for amazon.com)
